Acceptance

Features
Card features
RuPay Select Credit Card
Global validity
Available
Credit Card Limit
Ranges from ₹.1 lac to ₹. 50 lacs
Revolving credit facility
Available
Repayment facility through alternate banking channels.
Available
Cash withdrawal facility
Available with service charges @ ₹ 30/- per ₹1000/- or part thereof.
Inactivity fee, if the Card is not used for a minimum annual turnover
₹.300/- per annum - if the turnover is below the threshold limit of ₹.1,00,000/- per year
Insurance cover for Death due to Personal Accident – for card holder and spouse
AIR Accident:
₹ 8.00 lakhs for self
₹ 4.00 lakhs for spouse
Other than Air Accident:
₹ 4.00 lakhs for self
₹ 2.00 lakhs for spouse
Lost Card Liability
In excess of ₹. 1000 from the time of reporting of loss of Card
Baggage Insurance
Purchase protection cover
Up to ₹25,000
Up to ₹25,000
Reward Points from M/s Loyalty Rewards
2 points for every ₹.100/- transaction for purchases/ payments. Value of each point is ₹. 0.25/-.
Maximum Credit Limit per month :
Rs.50,00,000/- & Minimum limit is Rs.1,00,000/-
Additional features provided by NPCI
Card features
RuPay Select Individual Credit Card
RuPay Insurance Program
₹ 10.00 lacs cover for Death due to Personal Accident and Permanent Disability.
Cash Back Offer - Utility Bill Payment Services
5% Cash back on payment of Utility Bills applicable for both online and PoS terminals capped at ₹. 50 per month.
Cash Back Offer on Eating Places & Restaurants
5% Cash Back Offer on Eating Places & Restaurants - capped at ₹ 50 per month
Lounge Access Program Domestic
Two Free Access per quarter.
Covers 30 Lounges across 11 cities in India
Lounge Access Program - International
Two Free Access per year - covers 500+ Lounges across 300+ cities worldwide
Concierge Services
24X7 Assistance - Referral and Reservation Services - Hotel, Dining, Car Rental, International Travel
Merchant Offers
Offers/ Discounts at select Online and POS merchants provided by NPCI from time to time
Merchant offers/ concierge services/ additional features provided by NPCI may vary from time to time
Refer following link for details of NPCI Offers
Independent income with a minimum of ₹10 lakh gross per annum for individuals.
Fee and Charges
Nature of Charge
Amount of Charge
Enrollment fee
NIL
Annual Fee
NIL
Card Inactivity Fee
Applicable only if the card turnover during the card year is less than ₹. 1,00,000/-
₹300/-
Free Credit Period
Minimum of 20 to and maximum of 50 days
Charges on Revolved Amount, Where the cardholder has been permitted Revolving Credit facility, the cardholder needs to pay only the minimum due amount indicated in the bill. The unpaid portion will only attract service charges.
2.50%p.m.(Annualized Percentage Rate 30% ) for all other credit cards.
Minimum repayment on Revolving Credit (Minimum Amount Due – MAD):
5% of Total outstanding amount (Min. ₹. 100) + all applicable charges/fees/taxes + EMI (in cases of EMI availed by card holder)+ over the limit amount (if any)
Card Replacement Fee
₹. 300/- per card (applicable for both primary and addon card)
Mark up in case of Transaction in foreign currency
Upto 3% of transaction Amount
Duplicate Statement
₹. 10 per page
Cheque dishonor charges or unsuccessful payment instructions
₹. 50
EMI Processing fee
2% of transaction amount with minimum of ₹. 100/- and Maximum of ₹. 200/-
Rate of interest on EMI
13% p.a. for EMI period of 3,6 and 9 months and 14% p.a. for EMI period of 12,18 and 24 months.
EMI Pre-closure penal charges
2% of outstanding principle.
Surcharges
Railway Tickets – Railway Counters
Railway Tickets – www.irctc.co.in
₹. 30+ 2.5% of transaction amount 1% of transaction amount + all applicable taxes
Fuel Surcharges
Petrol & all products/services sold at petrol pumps
1% of transaction value with minimum fee of ₹. 10+ applicable taxes.
Maximum of ₹ 100/- for the billing month would be reimbursed in the upcoming billing month in the following cases
Card should have been used for a minimum amount of ₹. 2500/- for purchase transactions during the billing month.
Minimum purchase of petrol & petroleum products per occasion(ticket size) for reckoning under this scheme is ₹.400/-.
Transaction fee for cash withdrawal through Credit Card at Canara Bank ATMs *(per transaction)
*Use of other Bank ATMs attracts extra charges levied by the respective banks.
3% of transaction amount subject to a minimum of Rs. 150/- and the finance charges from date of withdrawal till date of payment.
Copy of charge slip
Domestic ₹. 100/-
International US $10/- or equivalent
Original Charges slip: If processed by our Bank
USD 2.00 (Approximate rupee equivalent is charged)
Original Charges slip: If Procured from other Bank
USD 6.00 (Approximate rupee equivalent is charged)
Collection charges for outstation cheques
₹. 100 per instrument+ other banks charges, if any
Charges in respect of notices reminders sent to cardholders having overdues
₹. 50/- per notice
Services Charges for Delayed payment beyond due date For Revolver and Non-revolver
Late payment fee of ₹ 250/- + GST will be charged, this is in addition to existing service charges (2.5% p.m. i.e. 30% per Annum) on carried over balance.
All the above listed charges excluding GST and 18% GST will be charged extra
All other out of pocket expenses incurred for any services rendered will be collected in addition to the fees/charges mentioned above.
All fees / charges are subject to change and at the discretion of the Bank. The changes in fees / charges and the effective date will be indicated in the bills / MITC/ Bank site/ SMS /emails etc. Intimation on any such modification in fee/charges will be intimated to customer through SMS /emails etc. Bill/statement will be generated only when there is a billable transaction for the billing month.

EMI Conversion
Easy EMI Conversion throughCanara ai1 app :
EMI Conversion Charges:
Min: ₹100/-, 2% of Transaction Value and Max: ₹200/-.
EMI Rate: 13% p.a. for below 1 Year (3,6,9 months), 14% p.a. for 1 Year & Above (12, 18, 24 months)
Other Offers
Seasonal Offers are available on Canara Cards.
* All the above listed charges excluding GST and 18% GST will be charged extra.
Eligible credit limit is maximum upto 75% of principal amount of FD (Fixed Deposit).
Minimum credit card limit is Rs. 25,000
Secured credit Card is issued to individuals against Deposits standing in the name of the applicant. Joint Deposits with payment condition “Either or Survivor” in which the applicant is one of the depositors shall also be accepted. Add on Cards can be issued to other joint depositors.

Card should have been used for a minimum amount of Rs. 2500/- for purchase transactions during the billing month.

Transaction fee for cash withdrawal through Credit Card at Canara Bank ATMs *(per transaction) *Use of other Bank ATMs attracts extra charges levied by the respective banks.

Domestic Rs. 100/-
International US $10/- or equivalent

USD 2.00 (Approximate rupee equivalent is charged)

Charges in respect of notices reminders sent to cardholders having overdues
Rs. 50/- per notice
Services Charges for Delayed payment beyond due date For Revolver and Non-revolver
Late payment fee of Rs 250/- + GST will be charged, this is in addition to existing service charges (2.5% p.m. i.e. 30% per Annum) on carried over balance.
All the above listed charges excluding GST and 18% GST will be charged extra.
All other out of pocket expenses incurred for any services rendered will be collected in addition to the fees/charges mentioned above.
All fees / charges are subject to change and at the discretion of the Bank. The changes in fees / charges and the effective date will be indicated in the bills / MITC/ Bank site/ SMS /emails etc. Intimation on any such modification in fee/charges will be intimated to customer through SMS /emails etc. Bill/statement will be generated only when there is a billable transaction for the billing month.
